rationale: Builds on the current best late-roundtrip and FP16-tail rescue by changing the endgame optimizer behavior instead of repeating clipping or row-group experiments. Once quant-aware training becomes active, matrix and embedding learning rates are reduced more aggressively than scalar/control rates so the model can settle into the exact final quantized manifold while small float controls still adapt. This targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact directly with minimal complexity and no metric-pipeline changes.
title: Quant-Aware Late LR Rebalance
